es.gob.fnmt.net.http

Class HTTPClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.gob.fnmt.net.http.HTTPClient

  • public class HTTPClient
extends java.lang.Object
    Simple HTTP client wrapper.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static boolean ShowConnectionTrace 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      HTTPClient(java.lang.String url)
      'GET' request.
      HTTPClient(java.lang.String url, java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> params)
      'POST' request with URL encoded parameters.
      HTTPClient(java.lang.String url, MultipartData params)
      'POST' request with MultipartData parameters.
      HTTPClient(java.lang.String url, java.lang.String method)
      'GET' or 'POST' request.

    • Field Detail

      • ShowConnectionTrace

        public static boolean ShowConnectionTrace

    • Constructor Detail

      • HTTPClient

        public HTTPClient(java.lang.String url)
        'GET' request.
        Parameters:
        url - URL to connect.

      • HTTPClient

        public HTTPClient(java.lang.String url,
                  java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> params)
        'POST' request with URL encoded parameters.
        Parameters:
        url - URL to connect.
        params - List of pair parameter name and value to send.

      • HTTPClient

        public HTTPClient(java.lang.String url,
                  MultipartData params)
        'POST' request with MultipartData parameters.
        Parameters:
        url - URL to connect.
        params - MultipartData parameter data to send.

      • HTTPClient

        public HTTPClient(java.lang.String url,
                  java.lang.String method)
        'GET' or 'POST' request.
        Parameters:
        url - URL to connect.
        method - 'GET' or 'POST'.

    • Method Detail

      • getByteArrayResponse

        public byte[] getByteArrayResponse()
                            throws java.io.IOException
        Get the response as byte array.
        Returns:
        Content of the response body as byte array.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getByteArrayResponse

        public byte[] getByteArrayResponse(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> requestProperties)
                            throws java.io.IOException
        Get the response as byte array.
        Parameters:
        requestProperties - List of pair property and value to specify in the request.
        Returns:
        Content of the response body as byte array.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getByteArrayResponse

        public byte[] getByteArrayResponse(javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory socketFactory)
                            throws java.io.IOException
        Get the response as byte array.
        Parameters:
        socketFactory - Underlying factory of sockets to use by the connection.
        Returns:
        Content of the response body as byte array.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getByteArrayResponse

        public byte[] getByteArrayResponse(javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory socketFactory,
                                   java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> requestProperties)
                            throws java.io.IOException
        Get the response as byte array.
        Parameters:
        socketFactory - Underlying factory of sockets to use by the connection.
        requestProperties - List of pair property and value to specify in the request.
        Returns:
        Content of the response body as byte array.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getLastResponse

        public int getLastResponse()
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Get the HTTP response code of the last request.
        Returns:
        HTTP response code.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if there is no previous request.

      • getResponse

        public int getResponse()
                throws java.io.IOException
        Establish the connection and returns the status.
        Returns:
        HTTP code indicating the status of the connection.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getResponse

        public int getResponse(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> requestProperties)
                throws java.io.IOException

        Returns:
        HTTP response code indicating the status of the connection.

        java.io.IOException

                throws java.io.IOException
        Establish the connection and returns the status.
        Parameters:
        socketFactory - Underlying factory of sockets to use by the connection.
        Returns:
        HTTP response code indicating the status of the connection.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getResponse

        public int getResponse(javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory socketFactory,
                       java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> requestProperties)
                throws java.io.IOException

        Parameters:
        socketFactory - Underlying factory of sockets to use by the connection.
        requestProperties - List of pair property and value to specify in the request.
        Returns:
        HTTP response code indicating the status of the connection.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
